1: import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
2: import { getAuthHeaders } from "./use-auth";

4: export type MenuItem = {

18: export function useMenuItems() {
19:   return useQuery({
20:     queryKey: ["/api/products"],
21:     queryFn: async () => {
22:       const res = await fetch("/api/products", { credentials: "include", headers: getAuthHeaders() });
23:       if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch menu items");
24:       return res.json() as Promise<MenuItem[]>;
25:     },
26:   });
27: }
28: 
29: export function useCreateMenuItem() {
30:   const queryClient = useQueryClient();
31:   
32:   return useMutation({
33:     mutationFn: async (data: { name: string; price: number; description?: string; image?: string | null }) => {
34:       const res = await fetch("/api/products", {
35:         method: "POST",
36:         headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", ...getAuthHeaders() },
37:         body: JSON.stringify(data),
38:         credentials: "include",
39:       });
40:       
41:       if (!res.ok) {
42:         const errorData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
43:         throw new Error(errorData.message || "Failed to create menu item");
44:       }
45:       
46:       return res.json();
47:     },
48:     onSuccess: () => {
49:       queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["/api/products"] });
50:     },
51:   });
52: }
53: 
54: export function useUpdateMenuItem() {
55:   const queryClient = useQueryClient();
56:   
57:   return useMutation({

59:       const res = await fetch(`/api/products/${id}`, {
60:         method: "PATCH",
61:         headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", ...getAuthHeaders() },
62:         body: JSON.stringify(data),
63:         credentials: "include",
64:       });
65:       
66:       if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to update menu item");

71:     },
72:   });
73: }
